name: RVH Inc.
summary: RVH Inc. provides women care, media consulting, and system development services in Japan. The company operates beauty salons for hair removal; and esthetic salons and day-time hot bath facility, as well as Sakurabuchi Kawaguchiko hotel. It also plans, manufactures, and sells ladies fashion products. In addition, the company is involved in the digital business consulting, marketing consulting, Internet mail order businesses; Web marketing, Web site planning and production, social game production, cross media production, and system development activities; graphics business for various applications; and business application system construction, customer database system construction, temporary staffing business, PC data erasure, and recycling businesses. Further, it engages in the development and sale of cosmetics and beauty products; and e-commerce management, and media planning and development activities, as well as system development, software development, package development, hardware development, contract research, and consulting businesses. The company was formerly known as RealVision Inc. and changed its name to RVH Inc. in April 2015. RVH Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
